author: l'Atelier
description: Citations Pandoc, bibliothèque Zotero (API), lecteurs PDF/EPUB et annotations dans Obsidian. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: l'Atelier
manifest.description: Citations Pandoc, bibliothèque Zotero (API), lecteurs PDF/EPUB et annotations.
manifest.name: PandoCit

name: PandoCit

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: 6f017ab Refactor esbuild configuration to improve build process. Introduce a new function to modify the foliate-view registration for better compatibility with Obsidian. Update build options and streamline the post-build process for asset copying.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: d534509 Refactor EPUB reader integration by removing legacy foliate-view.mjs references. Update related functions and settings to reflect that the EPUB reader is now bundled within main.js. Enhance localization strings for improved user feedback regarding EPUB reader availability.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
be9b02b Update version to 2.0.52 in manifest.json and package.json, and add version entry in versions.json.
2ae4402 Update .gitignore and deployment scripts to include foliate-view.mjs for EPUB reader functionality. Modify README files to reflect changes in asset management and local deployment instructions. Enhance localization for new EPUB reader settings and ensure proper installation checks for foliate-view.mjs in the plugin settings.
11ad3e3 Remove deprecated Foliate components including EPUB handling, comic book support, and dictionary functionalities. Clean up related configuration files and assets to streamline the project structure.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: fbceab7 Refactor EPUB reader to improve Zotero integration by streamlining CFI retrieval and section document handling. Remove unused EpubBook structure and enhance range handling for text selection. Update dependencies in package.json and clean up yarn.lock by removing obsolete packages.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
2139b69 Enhance tooltip functionality by adding responsive layout adjustments and scroll handling. Introduce new CSS properties for better overflow management and tooltip positioning within the viewport. Refactor tooltip rendering logic to support dynamic height and width constraints, improving user experience on various devices.
7e3beac Remove react-select dependency from package.json. Update README files in multiple languages to reflect changes in terminology from "Zotero library" to "Library". Enhance citation functionality by adding a modal for inserting citations and updating related settings. Refactor tooltip handling for citekeys and improve bibliography management features.
Remove react-select dependency from package.json. Update README files in multiple languages to reflect changes in terminology from "Zotero library" to "Library". Enhance citation functionality by adding a modal for inserting citations and updating related settings. Refactor tooltip handling for citekeys and improve bibliography management features.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
276a5ac Enhance citation functionality by adding support for inline footnotes. Update citation rendering logic to accommodate citations within inline footnotes, ensuring proper typography and formatting. Modify citation processing to handle nested footnotes and improve citation segment parsing. Update README to reflect new citation insertion feature without requiring Zotero installation.
f606de2 Update logo file format in README from JPG to PNG for improved compatibility.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
6e90d14 Update esbuild configuration to use Node's built-in modules directly, removing the dependency on 'builtin-modules'. Modify GitHub Actions workflow to include permissions for attestations and add a step for attesting release artifacts.
e8bdccb Refactor PDF worker handling to support gzip compression and base64 encoding for production builds. Update esbuild configuration to inject compressed worker code, and modify PDF worker logic to decode and utilize the embedded worker in both production and development environments.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: 3260453 Update README and workflow to reflect changes in PDF.js worker handling. The release process now publishes only essential files, with the PDF worker embedded in main.js. Added settings for optional PDF worker download in the plugin interface, along with corresponding translations in multiple languages.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: a13f9be Update CI workflow to utilize a local Yarn cache, enhancing dependency installation reliability. Modify README to reflect changes in Yarn install process and add .ci-yarn-cache to .gitignore.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
f1fa5fb Update plugin ID and documentation for PandoCit. Change references from 'obsidian-pandoc-reference-list' to 'pandocit' in the manifest, deployment script, and README files. Ensure compatibility with Obsidian's plugin guidelines.
32fb49f Enhance README documentation with new features for importing PDFs to Zotero, built-in PDF and EPUB readers, and Hypothesis integration. Update roadmap with short, medium, and long-term goals for EPUB and Hypothesis functionalities. Remove outdated release notes file.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: 8fb8b97 Update GitHub Actions workflow to improve dependency installation process. Remove yarn cache to prevent corruption issues and ensure consistent builds by using frozen lockfile during installation.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: 4bcc976 Refactor PDF file handling in PandoCit plugin. Introduce `resolveVaultFilePath` for improved path resolution, replace `vaultHasFileAt` with this new function, and enhance PDF opening logic with better error handling and logging. Update localization for user feedback.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: 07e7c80 Implement detailed PDF path resolution and logging in PandoCit plugin. Introduce new logging function for PDF opening attempts, enhance path resolution strategies, and update localization strings for improved user feedback across multiple languages.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
8280022 Implement citation interaction enhancements for mobile and desktop in PandoCit plugin. Add tap mode support for citations, update tooltip behavior, and improve citation path resolution. Remove unused logo image and update localization strings for better user experience.
1239d06 Enhance README files for PandoCit plugin by improving layout, clarity, and formatting. Update installation instructions, feature descriptions, and Zotero integration details across all language versions for a better user experience.
fa62fdc Refactor README files to improve layout and clarity, enhancing the presentation of the PandoCit plugin's features, installation instructions, and Zotero integration. Update language sections and formatting for better user experience.
467f6ca Update README.md to enhance plugin description, installation instructions, and integration details with Zotero. Improve formatting and clarity for better user experience.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: 2647e4d Update GitHub Actions workflow to use Node.js 20.x and enable yarn caching for improved build performance.

releases.author: Morglaf
releases.description: V2.0.30 with zotero api and no mandatory dependency with Pandoc.
releases.name: V2.0.30 with zotero api
